_shotImpulseComment: SHOT IMPULSE (2026-07-12, VRmike): a shot that lands on a DYNAMIC (knockable) prop gives it a small host-authoritative physics kick at the hit point along the shot direction, so shot items visibly react. This is the TARGET linear speed kick in m/s — shared/physics.js scales it by the hit body's mass so a heavy table and a light burger both get the SAME visible nudge (not a mass-based launch of the tiny props). Keep it small (a nudge, not a rocket launcher); raise for a punchier feel. HOT-TUNABLE, no rebuild. Host-only; replicates through the normal prop snapshot stream.
_fireRateComment: RAPID FIRE (2026-07-12, VRmike): the assault rifle is now HOLD-to-fire at a realistic assault-rifle/SMG cadence. fireRateRpm is the single tunable (rounds per minute; 600-800 is the real-world band). The HOST derives its authoritative fire-rate cap from this (60000/rpm ms between shots, minus a small jitter grace so a legit on-time client isn't throttled below the intended rate) so a modified client can't shoot faster; the CLIENT paces its held-fire auto-repeat off the same number. Damage per bullet is UNCHANGED (damage.base = 5%). fireCooldownMs above is the legacy fallback used only if fireRateRpm is absent.
_damageComment: HUNTER-TOOLS v1 damage tuning (all hot-tunable, no rebuild). base = damage a hunter's rifle does to an undisguised player (5 => 20 hits to kill at defaultMult; DAMAGE-TUNING 2026-07-12 lowered this 10->5). A disguised prop-PLAYER scales base by a SIZE multiplier lerped between smallSize/largeSize (metres, = 2*max half-extent of the disguise's footprint — the SAME size source physics bakes colliders from, so it auto-upgrades to measured bounds). smallMult (tiny, e.g. burger ~0.72 m => still dies in ~2 hits at 50 dmg — rescaled 5->10 to hold ~2 hits at the new 5 base) lerps down to largeMult (big, e.g. table ~2.25 m => ~3x the default player's bullets at ~1.7 dmg => ~59 hits vs 20). Sizes at/below smallSize clamp to smallMult; at/above largeSize clamp to largeMult. defaultMult applies to an UNDISGUISED player (no size). WRONG-GUESS PENALTY (a hunter shooting a disguisable decoy — a prop or non-arch fixture that COULD have been a player) is now a FLAT `base` hit with NO size multiplier EVER (20 wrong guesses = dead); real architecture is still a free miss. selfScalesWithSize is retained as false and is NO LONGER read by the referee (the penalty is unconditionally flat).
